title: How People Change the Earth
summary: People have learned to change the world around them over time. Long ago, they used fire to cook and shape land. Today, we have big farms, cities, and trade that let us change the planet a lot. This is called the Anthropocene, which means humans are now a big force on Earth. While these changes help people live better lives, they also cause problems like climate change and pollution. But people can work together to fix these problems. By cooperating and using our skills, we can make the Earth healthier while still enjoying the good things we have created.

when the Earth's weather gets warmer and causes problems
dirty things that harm the air, water, or land
when people work together to do something

What can people do to help Earth?
Why is the Anthropocene important?
options: It shows humans are a big force on Earth
It is a new type of rock

background_read: The Anthropocene is a word scientists use to describe how humans are changing the Earth in big ways. People have always used tools and ideas to make life better, like farming and building cities. But these changes can also hurt the planet, so we need to learn how to fix things while keeping the good parts. By understanding this, kids can see how everyone can help take care of our world.
Article_Structure: WHO: People and societies, including scientists like Erle Ellis
WHAT: Humans change the Earth through tools and ideas, causing both good and bad effects
WHERE: All over the planet, from local places to the whole world
WHY: To improve lives, but we need to work together to solve problems like pollution

perspectives.description: Humans have the ability to change the Earth a lot, which can be used for good or bad.
